problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
